reviews.review_description: First, this app has done a really good job of creating a big, holistic environment. You can walk freely around the whole park and interact with animals and there are a lot of cool little things to find and explore. There's also big variety of rides. I really love the concept and I really love the effort. That said, there are a LOT of bugs, most I've ever seen in a VR app. One roller coaster wouldn't let me off, rides that say closed are actually open, got loading screen during a ride, etc etc. Developer needs to get some beta testers (go to reddit) and just start fixing bugs one by one. Fixing the bugs and a graphics update would make this a top-flight app. But definitely needs some work, hope the dev is up to it!
Every time I try to play I'm in the middle of a lake and I cant move anywhere.
I paid money for this. It should be free for the performance I’m getting. Especially since the graphics aren’t anything to right home about.

developer_response.body: Hi Dear, thanks for your feedback, we currently works on another project. But we will come back soon with a big update !

reviews.review_description: atmosphere seems nice but framerate is bad on s7. encountered some minor bugs but also major ones. started a shooting game. no bullets flew out and i couldnt destroy enemies. also couldnt exit the attraction. please fix and offer more controll options. gamepad etc.

developer_response.body: Hi Dear, thanks for your feedback, we currently works on another project. But we will come back soon with a big update !

reviews.review_description: Really good amusement park concept but ill give it a review as soon as it gets a really cool update etc. but other than that looks fun and promising.

It has a lot of promise, make it a bit more stable, and for heavens sake let me rotate my view by swiping the touchpad. I go down a path then have to try and contort my neck to reverse out. Seriously how hard is it to allow movement by the touchpad!

developer_response.body: Hi Dear, thanks for your feedback, we currently works on another project. But we will come back soon with a big update !

reviews.review_title: Don't spend money on this just yet..
reviews.review_description: The game has a great concept and excellent environment.. that being said it is not optimised for oculus go and/or has some serious bugs. I can't use my controller touchpad to turn directions and as far as I can tell there is no shortcut to rotate view 180. The graphics on space free fall are shocking (is the earth meant to be a pure cyan circle with dark blue flashing through it?) and when I do look around the game lags and creates a black boarder until I stop moving my head again which nulls the VR effect. Tightrope game I don't even move when "running/walking on the spot and just sit still. Didn't even bother trying the others as this alone ruined experience for me. Would love to give it 5stars but needs much improvement. By looks of it Dev doesn't reply and hasn't even implemented touchpad control since first comment request on release so I'm guessing game will not be fixed unfortunately which makes me recommend do not buy until you see a dev reply or something about an update.

developer_response.body:
Hi Dear, thanks for your feedback, we currently works on another project.
But we will come back soon with a big update !

reviews.review_description: The game is so full of glitches on go, it is a waste of your money.
I would like my money returned as this game is not working properly at all
